name: Butternut Squash with Onions and Pecans
recipeIngredient: 6 cups butternut squash, peeled and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the squash into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Toast the pecans.
3. Melt butter in a heavy large skillet.
4. Add onion and saute until very tender, about 15 minutes.
5. Add squash and toss to coat. Cover and cook until squash is tender but still holds its shape, stirring frequently, about 15-30 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
- (Can be prepared 4 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Rewarm over medium heat before continuing.)
7. Stir in half of the pecans and half of the parsley.
8. Transfer to a bowl.
9. Sprinkle with remaining pecans and parsley and serve.
